pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source and target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source and target flags is deprecated in newer JDKs and maven-compiler-plugin versions; release is the standard for cross-compilation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial to avoid compilation errors or warnings treated as errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.
